recommendations.title: Puss in Boots: The Last Wish
recommendations.overview: Puss in Boots discovers that his passion for adventure has taken its toll: He has burned through eight of his nine lives, leaving him with only one life left. Puss sets out on an epic journey to find the mythical Last Wish and restore his nine lives.

recommendations.title: The Jetsons Meet the Flintstones
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Elroy Jetson invents a time machine that takes him back to prehistoric times, where he meets the Flintstone family.

recommendations.title: The Boss Baby: Christmas Bonus
recommendations.overview: Christmas Eve takes a twisty turn when the Boss Baby accidentally swaps places with one of Santa's elves and gets stranded at the North Pole.

recommendations.title: Plankton: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Plankton's tangled love story with his sentient computer wife goes sideways when she takes a stand — and decides to destroy the world without him.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: Little Witch Academia
recommendations.overview: Inspired by a magician named Shiny Chariot, the lively Akko Kagari enters the Little Witch Academy with the dream of one day becoming as cool as her idol.

recommendations.title: Grind
recommendations.overview: Four skaters follow their idol on his summer tour in an attempt to get noticed, get sponsored, and become stars themselves.

recommendations.title: Tarzan II
recommendations.overview: When one of his missteps puts his family in jeopardy, Tarzan decides they would be better off without him.

recommendations.title: Foodfight!
recommendations.overview: The evil Brand X joins a supermarket that becomes a city after closing time.

recommendations.title: It's the Great Pumpkin, Charlie Brown
recommendations.overview: Join the Peanuts gang for a timeless adventure as Charlie Brown preps for a party, Snoopy sets his sights on the Red Baron, and Linus patiently awaits a pumpkin patch miracle.
